name: iota-gaskit
description: Open-source toolkit for deploying, securing, monitoring, and integrating IOTA gas-sponsored transactions.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/shared-types && npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/policy-gateway && npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/sdk && npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/policy-gateway-service
scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test packages/*/src/*.test.ts apps/*/src/*.test.ts
scripts.grant:check: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run smoke:local && npm run smoke:demo-dapp && npm run smoke:demo-browser && npm run pack:check
